positive: A minimalist, highly stylized line-art illustration of a vibrant, fantastical forest scene. The main subject is a group of intertwined, stylized flora: bioluminescent mushrooms, exotic coiled vines, and giant, abstract leaves, all forming a perfect circular wreath composition. The style should mimic modern woodcut engraving mixed with celestial scientific diagram aesthetics. Use strong, saturated jewel tones—deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, and touches of luminous gold—against a clean, cream background. The contrast must be high, emphasizing clean, crisp silhouettes and intricate negative space. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for direct application onto a garment.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, dirty, noisy, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, realistic photography, photorealism, gradient, bokeh, grain, distressed
